dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7476 IH: Water Infrastructure Assistance Reauthorization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Taylor introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act to reauthorize certain water infrastructure grants, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Water Infrastructure Assistance Reauthorization Act.

section.header: Water, waste disposal, and wastewater facility grants
section.text: Section 306(a)(2)(B)(vii) of the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act (7 U.S.C. 1926(a)(2)(B)(vii)) is amended by striking 2019 through 2023 and inserting 2026 through 2031.
